message:
fix: complete SessionHandle integration and session_state refactor

Final fixes for the thread-safe session architecture:

extensions.rs:
- Add missing import for ExtensionDispatcher and ExtensionUiHandler

interactive.rs:
- Restore eager session loading for conversation messages in PiApp::new()
- This was accidentally removed in previous refactor

rpc.rs:
- Refactor session_state() to accept &Session directly instead of
  &AgentSession, avoiding redundant field access through session.session
- Add inner session locks for:
  - get_state: pass inner session to session_state()
  - set_session_name: lock inner session for append_session_info()
  - get_last_response: lock inner session for last_assistant_text()
  - export_html: lock inner session for export_html()
- Clean up session_state() to access header/path/entries directly

This ensures all RPC handlers correctly acquire the session mutex before
accessing session data, preventing potential race conditions with the
agent loop or extension callbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
